backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines an Enquiry type, stores submitted enquiries in a list, and exposes submitEnquiry (write) and getAllEnquiries (query) endpoints, plus blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that HeroSection.tsx was updated to display '20,000+ Happy Families' and '5,000+ Products' counter values.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities entry with OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and destructive tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Google Fonts preconnect for Playfair Display and Inter, targeting Dwarka Bartan Store in Akhnoor.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles all page sections and floating UI elements (WhatsApp button, mobile call bar, exit-intent popup) into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Validated contact/enquiry form that submits data to the backend canister and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat on success, with inline error handling.
Renders five customer review cards with Intersection Observer-triggered fade-in animations and sequentially animated star ratings.
Dialog popup triggered by mouse leaving the viewport (desktop) or after 30 seconds (mobile), promoting a bulk order discount with WhatsApp and call CTAs.
frontend/src/components/FestiveOfferBann: A dismissible top banner component displaying a festive promotional offer with a phone number link and a close button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating WhatsApp button with a pulse animation that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat for the store.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, product categories, contact CTAs (call/WhatsApp), and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, a call CTA button, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, trust badges, call/WhatsApp/directions CTA buttons, and key business stats.
Store location section with an embedded Google Map, address card, phone card, and business hours, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/MobileCallBar.ts: A fixed bottom call-to-action bar visible only on mobile devices, linking directly to the store's phone number.
frontend/src/components/ProductCategorie: Product category grid displaying six store categories (e.g., utensils, cookware, gift items) as animated cards with images and WhatsApp enquiry links.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: React section component displaying five reasons to choose Dwarka Bartan Store (quality, price, variety, service, trust) as animated cards with an intersection observer, plus a bottom call-to-action banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitEnquiry mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitEnquiry method and invalidates the enquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for gold and steel color palettes (light and dark modes), and utility classes for gradients, shadows, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based gold/steel color tokens, display/body font families, custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the version, architectural notes, existing features, and known issues for the Dwarka Bartan Store business website build.
